descriptions: A former Rodents Motorcycle Club member was affiliated with the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: A former member of Rodents Motorcycle Club, who was affiliated with the Hells Angels, was arrested along with two other men who, according to the police investigation, had been in the car before the murder.

Mexikanemi.description: Mexikanemi, also known as the Texas Mexican Mafia, is a Mexican-American prison and street gang founded in 1984 in the Texas state prison system. It operates independently from the California Mexican Mafia and engages in drug trafficking, human trafficking, loansharking, money laundering, extortion, and murder. The gang has a formal constitution and hierarchical structure, with an estimated 4,000 members primarily in Texas.

descriptions: Mexikanemi is listed as an ally of Mexican Mafia in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Armenian Power, Aryan Brotherhood, Gambino crime family, Hells Angels MC (1960s–1980s), Independent Soldiers, Los Angeles crime family, Mexikanemi, Mongols MC, MS-13, Sinaloa Cartel, Sureños, Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Mexikanemi listed as an ally of the Mexican Mafia in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Armenian Power, Aryan Brotherhood, Gambino crime family, Hells Angels MC (1960s–1980s), Independent Soldiers, Los Angeles crime family, Mexikanemi, Mongols MC, MS-13, Sinaloa Cartel, Sureños, Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Gulf Cartel is listed as an ally of Mexikanemi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Mexican Mafia , Los Zetas

descriptions: Juárez Cartel is listed as an ally of Mexikanemi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Mexican Mafia , Los Zetas

descriptions: Los Zetas is listed as an ally of Mexikanemi.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Mexican Mafia , Los Zetas

descriptions: Mexikanemi is separate from the original California Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: It functions separately from the original California Mexican Mafia

descriptions: Nuestra Familia is listed as a rival of Mexikanemi.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuestra Familia , Texas Syndicate

descriptions: Texas Syndicate is listed as a rival of Mexikanemi.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuestra Familia , Texas Syndicate

descriptions: Mexikanemi is a rival of Nuestra Familia.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mexikanemi

descriptions: Mexikanemi is listed as an enemy of Nuestra Familia in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria , Bulldogs de Fresno , Mafia mexicana , Mexikanemi , Sindicato de Texas , Sureños

descriptions: Puro Tango Blast formed for protection against Mexikanemi.
edges.evidence_quote: Incarcerated Hispanic men from major Texas cities (including Houston , Dallas , Fort Worth , Austin ), have banded together for protection from established security threat groups like Mexikanemi and the Texas Syndicate .

descriptions: Texas Syndicate lists Mexikanemi as rivals in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Brotherhood, Nuestra Familia, Mexican Mafia, Mexikanemi, Tango Blast

descriptions: Infobox lists Mexikanemi as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria, Mafia mexicana, Mexikanemi, Nuestra Familia

descriptions: MOVADEF is a political wing branch of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: It has two main branches, MOVADEF (2009–2024) and FUDEPP

Chao pho.description: Chao pho is a term for organized crime bosses in Thailand, based in provinces with both legitimate and criminal business interests. They are involved in activities such as prostitution, drug trafficking, and illegal gambling, and often cooperate with the United Wa State Army. They maintain close ties with bureaucrats, police, military, and local politicians, and play a role in elections.

descriptions: Chao pho cooperate with Red Wa for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: They are known for cooperating with the Red Wa (who are associated with the United Wa State Army) for the trafficking and sale of narcotics.

descriptions: Hamza Division assassinated an Ahrar al-Sham commander.
edges.evidence_quote: On 22 June 2018, an Ahrar al-Sham commander was assassinated in al-Bab by gunmen believed to be part of the Hamza Division.

descriptions: Lashkar-e-Taiba is part of the United Jihad Council umbrella organization.
edges.evidence_quote: Part of: United Jihad Council

Sio Sam Ong.description: A leading Chinese triad in Malaysia, based in Penang and Selangor, with strong presence in northern states like Kedah and Perlis. Established in the 1940s-1950s, it is considered one of the most powerful triads in the country, primarily composed of Hokkien ethnic group. The organization is involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, murder, extortion, racketeering, and loansharking, and has been linked to multiple murders in Penang.

descriptions: Ah Kong built strong ties with Sio Sam Ong.
edges.evidence_quote: over the years they had built strong ties with the infamous Penang -based Sio Sam Ong

descriptions: The Strangio and Bellocco-Ascone were involved together in international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2011 si conclude ... l'operazione Imelda ... con 31 arresti ... nei confronti delle famiglie Nirta-Strangio, Bellocco - Ascone ... accusati di traffico internazionale di droga.

descriptions: Falange Armata claimed responsibility for a massacre committed by the White Uno Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The massacre was immediately claimed by the terrorist group Falange Armata.

Cotroni crime family.description: Italian Canadian crime family based in Montreal, Quebec, established in the 1940s by Vincenzo Cotroni. Considered a branch of the Bonanno crime family, it controlled territory in Quebec and Ontario. An internal war in the late 1970s led to the rise of the Rizzuto faction. The family declined after Vincenzo's death in 1984 and his brother Frank's in 2004.

descriptions: Lo Presti formed alliances with the Cotroni 'ndrina in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti di affari con la Famiglia Inzerillo -Spatola-Gambino di Palermo , attraverso la quale strinse alleanze anche oltreoceano con la Famiglia Gambino di New York e con le famiglie della 'Ndrangheta in Canada degli Zito , dei Commisso , dei Racco, degli Stalteri a Toronto e dei Cotroni a Montréal .

descriptions: Paolo Violi became a member of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Paolo Violi ... entra a fare parte della famiglia Cotroni.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cotroni family as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Infobox lists Cotroni crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: The infobox lists the Cotroni crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: The Bonanno family lists the Cotroni crime family as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Infobox lists Cotroni family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Bonanno family cooperated with Cotroni family in heroin smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: Carmine Galante to Montreal, Quebec, Canada, to supervise the family drug business there, where he worked with the Calabrian Vincenzo Cotroni of the Cotroni family in the French Connection heroin smuggling scheme.

descriptions: Bonanno family lists Cotroni as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cotroni crime family

descriptions: The Bonanno crime family had influence over the Cotroni crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonanno crime family and the Buffalo crime family also had influence in several factions in Canada including the Rizzuto crime family and Cotroni crime family, and the Luppino crime family and Papalia crime family, respectively.

descriptions: Bonanno family has influence over Cotroni family in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: La familia criminal Bonanno y la familia criminal de Búffalo tuvieron también influencia en varias facciones en Canadá incluyendo a ... la familia criminal Cotroni

descriptions: The Cotroni family feuded with the Blass gang.
edges.evidence_quote: the Cotronis engaged in a violent feud with French-Canadian mobster Richard Blass

descriptions: The Cotroni family was considered a branch of the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considered the family a branch of the Bonanno crime family of New York City.

descriptions: The Cotroni crime family is a satellite of the Bonanno crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Montreal-based Cotroni crime family, the Canadian satellite of New York's Bonanno crime family

descriptions: The Magaddino family was involved in a struggle for control that affected the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: A provincial commission in 1969 blamed the murders on a struggle for control between the Bonanno family in New York City and the Magaddino family in Buffalo

descriptions: The Cotroni family allied with the Commisso 'ndrina in the early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Melo took the lead in forging a cross-Canada alliance with the Commisso 'ndrina of Toronto

descriptions: The Dubois gang is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Cotroni family allied with the Hells Angels East End Vancouver chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: Melo took the lead in forging a cross-Canada alliance with the Commisso 'ndrina of Toronto and the East End Vancouver chapter of the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Cotroni and Rizzuto factions fought a mob war.
edges.evidence_quote: As tensions grew into a power struggle between the Calabrian and Sicilian factions of the family, a mob war began in 1973.

descriptions: The Rizzuto faction overtook the Cotroni family after an internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: This allowed the Sicilian Rizzuto faction to overtake the Cotroni's Calabrian faction as the preeminent crime family in Montreal.

descriptions: The two crime families were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family.

descriptions: The Rock Machine is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Cotroni crime family used the Krays to sell stolen bonds in Britain, a cooperative business deal.
edges.evidence_quote: The Montreal-based Cotroni crime family, the Canadian satellite of New York's Bonanno crime family, decided to sell the stolen bonds in Britain through the Krays.

descriptions: The Cotroni family was involved in a drug network with the West End Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Operation Caviar, a three-year RCMP investigation into an international drug network involving the Mafia and the West End Gang.

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers rivaled the Cotroni family in Montreal during the 1960s and 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: By the 1960s the Dubois Brothers were gaining control and were becoming the only crime group in Montreal that were considered to rival the Cotroni family in the 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers were rivals of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: the only crime group in Montreal that were considered to rival the Cotroni family in the 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: Paolo Violi maintained ties with the Luppino family while developing connections with the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: In Montreal, Violi developed connections with the Cotroni crime family, while maintaining ties with the Luppino family

descriptions: The two crime families were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family.

descriptions: Rizzuto family originated as a faction within Cotroni family; later overtook them in a war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicolo Rizzuto ... established the organization in the 1970s as part of the Sicilian faction of the Montreal-based Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Infobox lists Cotroni as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Rizzuto family fought and overtook the Cotroni family in a war.
edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.

descriptions: Rizzuto family rivals Cotroni crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Rizzuto family originated as a faction of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicolo Rizzuto ... established the organization in the 1970s as part of the Sicilian faction of the Montreal-based Cotroni crime family.

descriptions: Rock Machine killed a member of the Cotroni crime family to gain favor with the Rizzutos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family ... Cotroni was killed partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos and partly because he was a friend of Boucher.

descriptions: The Rock Machine killed a Cotroni family member to gain favor with the Rizzutos, indicating hostility toward the Cotronis.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family. Cotroni was killed partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos and partly because he was a friend of Boucher.

descriptions: The head of the Siderno Group in Canada maintained close contacts with the Cotroni crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: He maintained close contacts with ... the Cotroni crime family in Montreal.

descriptions: West End Gang and Cotroni family jointly committed a bank robbery.
edges.evidence_quote: the theft of some $20,000 in cash from the vault of the Brockville Trust & Saving Company in Brockville on 4 May 1958 was a joint operation of the West End Gang and the Cotroni family.

descriptions: The Cotroni crime family is listed as an ally of the West End Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cali Cartel, Cotroni crime family, Hells Angels MC, Provisional IRA, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Roosevelt, Long Island set of Rollin' 60s feuded with the Roosevelt Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: This set had been established in 2003 and was responsible for dozens of shootings over the years as part of a feud with the Roosevelt Bloods gang.

descriptions: Cape Verdean street gangs in New England sometimes rival each other, leading to murder and violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: These gangs sometimes cooperate, but also often rival with each other leading to murder and violent clashes over turf.

descriptions: Cape Verdean street gangs in New England sometimes cooperate and sometimes rival each other.
edges.evidence_quote: These gangs sometimes cooperate, but also often rival with each other leading to murder and violent clashes over turf.

descriptions: The Faial family brokers deals between gangs, including the Woodward Avenue Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: This gang or family brokers many of the deals between gangs

descriptions: Cape Verdean street gangs in New England sometimes rival each other, leading to murder and violent clashes.
edges.evidence_quote: These gangs sometimes cooperate, but also often rival with each other leading to murder and violent clashes over turf.

descriptions: Cape Verdean street gangs in New England sometimes cooperate and sometimes rival each other.
edges.evidence_quote: These gangs sometimes cooperate, but also often rival with each other leading to murder and violent clashes over turf.

descriptions: Some Cape Verdean gangs perform strong-arm jobs for American Mafia crews.
edges.evidence_quote: while some others are involved in large-scale drug trafficking enterprises, as well as extortion, money laundering and strong-arm jobs for locally active American Mafia crews.

descriptions: Mano Negra is listed as a group under Black Eagles.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups - Mano Negra : operating in Putumayo (unknown number of members).

descriptions: The Abdel-Kader family cooperates with Jewish crime families, including the Zeev Rosenstein syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Clans like Tayibe based Abdel-Kader family are involved in extortion, drug and weapon trafficking, fraud as well as money laundering, often in cooperation with their Jewish counterparts.

descriptions: Both were involved in ecstasy trafficking in the US, but no direct cooperation or conflict is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Israeli crime organizations such as the Abergil crime family and Zeev Rosenstein were heavily involved in ecstasy trafficking in the United States.

descriptions: F-side lists S.C.F. Hooligans as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: S.C.F. Hooligans

descriptions: La Tropa del Infierno is the armed wing of Cártel del Noreste.
edges.evidence_quote: La "Tropa del Infierno" es el brazo armado del Cártel del Noreste

descriptions: Barriox13 has clashed with Campanella Park Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Campanella Park Piru is listed as an ally of Cedar Block Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Fruit Town Piru , West Side Piru , Tree Top Piru , Campanella Park Piru

descriptions: Campanella Park Piru is listed as an ally of Fruit Town Piru in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cedar Block Piru , Campanella Park Piru , Westside Piru , 145 Neighborhood Piru , Tree Top Pirus (former rival, coexists peacefully due to a peace treaty in Summer of 2024) , Compton Varrio Locos , Compton Varrio Largo 36 , Paybacc Crips

descriptions: The two sets held a public peace meeting after Nipsey Hussle's death in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: This started with a public meeting between the Swamp Crips and Campanella Park Pirus at Van Ness Park.

descriptions: Campanella Park Piru is listed as an ally of Tree Top Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: West Side Piru , Campanella Park Piru, Fruit Town Pirus

descriptions: Gonzalo Rodríguez Gacha of the Medellín Cartel waged a personal campaign against the Unión Patriótica.
edges.evidence_quote: El Mexicano estuvo relacionado con la violencia esmeraldera y adelantó una campaña personal contra las Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia - Ejército del Pueblo (FARC-EP) y contra la Unión Patriótica (UP), a las que consideraba una extensión del grupo guerrillero.

descriptions: FARC-EP co-founded the Patriotic Union political party.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1985, members of the FARC–EP, along with a large number of other leftist and communist groups, formed a political party known as the Union Patriótica.

McCarthy-Dundon.description: Criminal gang based in Limerick City, Ireland, involved in drug dealing, extortion, and armed robbery. Founded in the 2000s by James McCarthy and Dessie Dundon. Central players in the Limerick feud, responsible for multiple murders including innocent civilians. Leaders were sentenced to life imprisonment by the early 2010s, and the gang has had no real power since 2010.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: Keane-Collopy considers McCarthy-Dundon as rivals in the Limerick feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: McCarthy-Dundon Gang

descriptions: The infobox lists the Hutch Organised Crime Gang as an ally of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang , Ryan Gang

descriptions: The McCarthy-Dundon Gang and the Keane-Collopy Gang are both participants in the Limerick feud, which is a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud, which involves several criminal families, mainly the McCarthy-Dundons, the Ryans and the Keane-Collopy gang from St. Mary's Park , has been ongoing since 2000.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Keane-Collopy Gang as a rival of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Keane-Collopy Gang

descriptions: The McCarthy-Dundon Gang and the Ryan Gang are both participants in the Limerick feud, which is a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud, which involves several criminal families, mainly the McCarthy-Dundons, the Ryans and the Keane-Collopy gang from St. Mary's Park , has been ongoing since 2000.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Ryan Gang as an ally of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang, despite also being listed as a participant in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang , Ryan Gang

Errol Flynns.description: The Errol Flynns were a street gang founded in the 1970s on the lower east side of Detroit, Michigan. They were known for flamboyant dress and hand signs, and engaged in extortion, robbery, and drug trafficking. The gang collapsed in the 1980s due to the rise of crack cocaine and successful prosecutions.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are mentioned alongside the 7 Mile Killers as comparable Detroit street gangs, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Like other Detroit street gangs, such as their Westside Detroit counterparts in the late 1970s; the Nasty Flynns (later the NF Bangers), and 7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs or the drug consortiums of the 1980s such as Young Boys Inc., Pony Down, Best Friends, Black Mafia Family and the Chambers Brothers, the Errol Flynns grew out of the racial and economic unrest that transformed Detroit in the late 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the 8 Mile sconys, meaning the 8 Mile sconys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Be Like Boys, meaning the Be Like Boys succeeded them.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Schoolcraft Boys, meaning the Schoolcraft Boys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to SNS, meaning SNS succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are mentioned alongside Young Boys Inc. as comparable Detroit gangs, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Like other Detroit street gangs, such as their Westside Detroit counterparts in the late 1970s; the Nasty Flynns (later the NF Bangers), and 7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs or the drug consortiums of the 1980s such as Young Boys Inc., Pony Down, Best Friends, Black Mafia Family and the Chambers Brothers, the Errol Flynns grew out of the racial and economic unrest that transformed Detroit in the late 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: The Oklahoma Irish Mob and Aryan Brotherhood were involved in a deadly shootout.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2018 3 members of the Irish Mob would be arrested for intimidation witnesses in the deadly gang shootout between Aryan Brotherhood members and Irish Mob members near a motel in Oklahoma.

descriptions: UAB has Oklahoma Irish Mob Gang as a rival per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Circle, Oklahoma Irish Mob Gang

descriptions: Hai San was allied with the Tokong society, which financed tin mining.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hai San society was allied with the Penang-based Tokong or Tua Peh Kong society

descriptions: Oficina de Envigado controlled the operations of Banda La Terraza.
edges.evidence_quote: La Oficina controlaba la operación de una banda que, en su tiempo, fue uno de los grupos sicariales más temidos en el país: La Terraza

descriptions: Bellocco supported the Camorra D'Alessandro clan in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: the Camorra D'Alessandro clan, who with the support of the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, were able to supply the entire region

descriptions: Pesce supported the Camorra D'Alessandro clan in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: the Camorra D'Alessandro clan, who with the support of the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, were able to supply the entire region

descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Roadside G's.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS had affiliations with some local gangs such as ... Roadside G's

descriptions: Roadside G's is listed as a rival of Peckham Boys in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn, GAS Gang, Ghetto Boys, OC (Organised Crime), Roadside G's

descriptions: The Klan and the National Socialist Party of America jointly attacked communist protesters.
edges.evidence_quote: On November 3, 1979, the Klan and the National Socialist Party of America killed five communist protesters in Greensboro, North Carolina, now known as the Greensboro massacre.

descriptions: Bonde do Maluco is allied with Mercado do Povo Atitude according to infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Terceiro Comando Puro , Guardiões do Estado , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte, and Mercado do Povo Atitude

descriptions: Lago fought Marfella and Contino (allied) in the first faida of Pianura from 1991 to 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: prima faida di Pianura : svoltasi tra il 1991 e il 2000 tra il clan Lago e i clan Contino e Marfella, questi ultimi due alleati

descriptions: Clan Lago fought a violent war against Clan Marfella.
edges.evidence_quote: Immediatamente dopo, sul medesimo territorio, ebbe inizio lo scontro con il clan alleato dei Contino, quello capeggiato da Giuseppe Marfella

descriptions: Splinter groups of Clan Sarno supported Clan Marfella.
edges.evidence_quote: dagli scissionisti del clan Sarno di Ponticelli

descriptions: Alleanza di Secondigliano supported Clan Marfella.
edges.evidence_quote: spalleggiato anche dall' Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans united to fight the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: thanks to the relationship between Teresa De Luca Bossa, mother of Antonio, with Giuseppe Marfella, boss of the Marfella clan, based in Pianura, the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella united to fight the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie alla frequentazione di Teresa De Luca Bossa con Giuseppe Marfella, boss di Pianura, le forze dei due clan si uniscono nel combattere il clan Lago

descriptions: Marfella clan is an ally of Vollaro clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ascione clan, Abate clan (defunct), Giuliano clan (defunct), Anastasio clan, Veneruso clan, Marfella clan

descriptions: Zwillman was an associate of the Luciano family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allegiance: Luciano Family (Associate)

descriptions: Zwillman's organization was a member of the National Crime Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Zwillman's criminal organization was a part of the National Crime Syndicate

descriptions: The two sets held a peace meeting in 2022, which was successful.
edges.evidence_quote: Skipp Townsend held a peace meeting over brunch with the rivaling Rollin' 60s Crips and Inglewood Family Bloods at a restaurant in Manhattan Beach.

descriptions: Bicheiros are listed as an ally of Brazilian militias in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cosa Nostra, Clan del Golfo, Group America, Carecas do ABC, Carecas do Subúrbio, Police Death squad, Neo-integralist groups, Bicheiros, Diehard Duterte Supporters
